networkSummary.positioning: Pharos is an EVM-compatible Layer 1 focused on RealFi, RWA, and AI-native onchain applications.

swapVenues.name: FaroSwap
swapVenues.description: Use for Pharos-native token swaps when the pair is available. Always verify the token address and inspect approvals before signing.
safeUseChecklist: Confirm wallet network is Pharos Pacific Mainnet for PROS.
Verify token addresses against a known-token list or official source.
Start with a small test swap when using a new route.
Avoid unlimited approvals unless the spender is verified and intentional.
Run transaction firewall inspection before signing.

zeroProsVenues.name: Pharos Port Bridge
zeroProsVenues.note: Use as the primary official entry when moving funds into Pharos from another network. The route may use an integrated bridge provider; verify destination chain, received token, recipient, fees, and approvals before signing.

zeroProsVenues.name: Jumper
zeroProsVenues.note: Use as a direct bridge aggregator route when Pharos routes are available. Verify Pharos as the destination chain, the received asset, fees, and route before signing.

pharosSwapVenues.name: FaroSwap
pharosSwapVenues.note: Use for swaps after the wallet already has assets on Pharos. FaroSwap is for Pharos-native token swaps, not for bridging funds from another chain by itself.

cexVenues.name: OKX
cexVenues.note: Centralized exchange spot market. Availability depends on region/account.

cexVenues.name: KuCoin
cexVenues.note: KuCoin PROS page with trade entry. Availability depends on region/account.

cexVenues.name: Bitget
cexVenues.note: Bitget listing page with spot trading link. Availability depends on region/account.

marketReferences.name: CoinGecko Markets
marketReferences.note: Use only to compare tracked markets; it is not a direct place to buy PROS.

onboardingPaths.title: New Wallet
onboardingPaths.goal: Get the wallet ready for Pharos without signing risky transactions.
steps: Verify the wallet address and account type.
Perform a low-risk read-only or small-value first action.

onboardingPaths.title: Swap Ready
onboardingPaths.goal: Prepare a wallet to swap PROS safely.
steps: Confirm native PROS balance for gas.
Choose a supported Pharos DEX route.
Reject dust/scam tokens and unknown unlimited approvals.

onboardingPaths.title: RealFi Ready
onboardingPaths.goal: Prepare a wallet for RWA/RealFi discovery without blindly depositing funds.
steps: Run pre-signing firewall checks for deposits or approvals.
